fileHeader.autoUpdate.description: Replace an outdated header path when file moves

showLanguage.description: Show the main language label (from VSCode)

jointLanguageAndFormatTemplate.description: Template for the combined language and format labels.

fileHeader.jointLanguageAndFormatTemplat.description: Template for the combined language and format labels.

useLanguagesById.description: Use VS Code language templates (keyed by languageId)

fileHeader.useLanguagesById.description: Use VS Code language templates (keyed by languageId)

useLanguagesByPath.description: Use filepath-based language templates (keyed by glob patterns)

fileHeader.useLanguagesByPath.description: Use filepath-based language templates (keyed by glob patterns)

matchStyle.description: Match by this type of path

fileHeader.matchStyle.description: Match by this type of path

languagesById.description: Language header templates keyed by VSCode language ID

roles.description: Optional mapping of glob patterns to role/type labels. Example: { 'src/components/*': 'React component' }

fileHeader.roles.description: Optional mapping of glob patterns to role/type labels. Example: { 'src/components/*': 'React component' }

ignore.description: Array of glob patterns or gitignore-style strings to ignore when inserting headers. Also respects `.gitignore` natively.

fileHeader.ignore.description: Array of glob patterns or gitignore-style strings to ignore when inserting headers. Also respects `.gitignore` natively.

skipWords.description: Array of words. If the first line of a file is a comment and contains any of these words, the file will be ignored.

fileHeader.skipWords.description: Array of words. If the first line of a file is a comment and contains any of these words, the file will be ignored.
